nasb.text: The hand of the sons of Israel pressed heavier and heavier upon Jabin the king of Canaan, until they had destroyed Jabin the king of Canaan.

esv.text: And the hand of the people of Israel pressed harder and harder against Jabin the king of Canaan, until they destroyed Jabin king of Canaan.

cnv.text: 以色列人的勢力日漸強盛，勝過迦南王耶賓，終於把迦南王耶賓除滅。

ccb.text: 以色列人越战越勇，最终消灭了耶宾王。
